pi_items.source: WebFetch and WebSearch confirmed books.toscrape.com is a real public website designed for web scraping practice
Extracted from target_url and verified via WebFetch
Verified in export_result.sh lines 16-27 and setup_task.sh line 36
Verified in export_result.sh lines 17-68 and setup_task.sh line 37

Verified in setup_task.sh lines 83-86 and in WebFetch of https://books.toscrape.com/ which contains 'Add to basket' text, 'In stock' text, and prices in £[0-9]+\.[0-9]{2} format (e.g., £51.77, £53.74)
Verified in verifier.py line 88 where condition 'csv_rows >= 20' determines scoring. books.toscrape.com has hundreds of books, making 20 rows achievable

privileged_info_summary: The task audits https://books.toscrape.com/, a real public website designed for web scraping practice. The website contains book listings with 'Add to basket' buttons, 'In stock' availability text, and prices in British pounds (£) format matching the regex £[0-9]+\.[0-9]{2} (examples: £51.77, £53.74). The task requires exporting Custom Search results to /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/custom_search_results.csv and a report to /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/content_quality_report.txt, with a minimum row count threshold of 20 rows for the CSV export.
